document.source_title: R Ashwin explains why CSK’s Urvil Patel played the ‘most important innings of IPL 2026’

claims.claim_text: Urvil Patel played the most important innings of IPL 2026.
claims.evidence_text: Ashwin went onto label Urvil’s knock as the most important knock of the season so far.
